Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Huanbo Electronic Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Huanbo Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. provides a breathtaking ultimate specimen of an 'encyclopedic' false registration and systemic demotion misjudgment. The forensic engine has forcefully cleared the underlying transnational consumer electronics OEM data pollution caused by Apple Inc. The official commercial system was intimidated by its business license, which runs hundreds of words long and almost copies half of the 'Industrial Classification for National Economic Activities,' especially the opening terms like 'motor manufacturing, satellite mobile communication terminal manufacturing,' directly elevating it to the altar of 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe and common-sense engine immediately executed a comprehensive peeling: this is a natural person sole proprietorship micro-enterprise with a paid-in capital of only 1.01 million RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is an extremely thin '11 people'! The most fatal coup de grace comes from its registered coordinates: 'Room 502, Building 2, Sancai Building, No. 10 Yongzhi Road, Qinhuai District, Nanjing City.' In a single room on the 5th floor of a commercial office building named 'Sancai Building' in the urban area, relying on 11 employees to build a massive heavy-industry empire ranging from 'generator set manufacturing' to 'satellite terminal manufacturing,' and then to 'refrigeration and air-conditioning equipment manufacturing' and 'metal processing machinery manufacturing'? This is not only an extreme mockery of industrial physics but also a provocation to urban fire safety and environmental protection regulations. Carefully reviewing its outrageously long business license, apart from the illusory 'manufacturing,' its true nature is completely exposed: 'food sales, trophy and pennant design and production, daily wooden products sales.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not some manufacturing giant spanning multiple heavy industry sectors. This is an '11-Person Universal Trading & Corporate Services Shell (micro universal trading broker, customized gift merchant, and corporate services shell company)' hidden on the 5th floor of an office building. To take on various messy government and enterprise procurement orders, the boss (Wang Min) stuffed every conceivable term into the license. From buying computers and installing air conditioners to distributing food welfare and customizing trophies and pennants, they can issue any invoice, while actually producing nothing themselves.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
